why: BharatNet Phase III funding, 5G densification, and surging data-centre demand are triggering a multi-year order cycle for optical fibre cable and active telecom equipment makers.

theme: Renewable Energy Capex – Solar & Green Power
why: PM Surya Ghar rooftop subsidy push, record FY26 capacity additions, and aggressive Adani/Tata pipeline are channelling large capex into solar generators, EPC firms, and power-equipment makers.

why: China-plus-one export shifts, recovering agrochem volumes after two weak years, and new CDMO contracts are lifting margins and order books across Indian specialty chemical names.
